prose: **Pyridine frontier-orbital gap** — DFT, tier `standard` (**B3LYP/def2-TZVP**, density-fit) in PySCF, **gas phase**, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: pre-optimized structure provided as input (`/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/pyridine/pyridine.xyz`); DFT run as a single point on that geometry (`DFT//geometry`). SCF converged after 10 cycles. HOMO = −7.2526 eV, LUMO = −1.1128 eV → **gap ≈ 6.1398 eV** (Koopmans-style orbital gap, not an excitation energy).
